title: Night Fever
why_this_song: Night Fever by Bee Gees (1977) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Gimme that night fever, night fever
We know how to show it
Prayin' for this moment to last
Gimme that night fever, night fever
We know how to show it
In the heat of our love
Don't need no help for us to make it

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "night" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "night" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "fever" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "fever" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Livin' on the music so fine

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: To take us to the mornin'

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Night Fever", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Night Fever", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Night Fever" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Night Fever" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Night Fever" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Night Fever", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: "Night Fever" was released in 1977. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Night Fever" foi lançada em 1977. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.
